# Shu Wang | Paid Media & Growth Strategy Lead

This file describes the professional portfolio website of Shu Wang, Canada Growth and Paid Media Strategy Lead at DoorDash.

## Context
Shu Wang is a senior growth marketer with over 7 years of experience managing $30M–$40M budgets at DoorDash and previously driving 30%+ revenue growth at The Home Depot. Her personality is friendly, outgoing, and extremely straightforward and metrics-driven.

## Core Professional Experience
- **DoorDash (2025–Present)**: Associate Manager, Growth Marketing (Canada). Led cross-channel Paid Social, Search, Affiliate, Programmatic, and Display strategy. Saved $2M–$3M in agency fees by insourcing campaign strategy and execution.
- **The Company Store / The Home Depot (2023–2025)**: Senior Paid Media Analyst. Grew social revenue by 32% and affiliate by 35% YoY. Developed A/B tests that scaled automated shopping contribution to 51%.
- **Lacoste (2021–2023)**: Digital Marketing Specialist, North America. Optimized $2M–$3M seasonal budgets, lifting blended ROAS from 1.3 to 1.5.

## Technical Skill Inventory
- **Paid Media Platforms**: Meta Ads, TikTok, Snapchat, Pinterest, Reddit, Google Ads, DV360, Amazon Ads, Criteo, Impact Radius.
- **Analytics & Data**: GA4, Adobe Experience Cloud, SQL, Snowflake, Tableau, seoClarity.
- **Testing & Measurement**: A/B Testing, MMM, Incrementality testing, attribution analysis.

## Direct Contact Information
- Email: shu96wang@gmail.com
- Phone: (551) 206-1607
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shu-wang-930779123/
